title: DEIB Phase Information for Intern Candidates — ELI program template
html:
DEIB Phase Information for Intern Candidates — ELI program template

Source: 2022-09-15 Google Doc — institutional template from Emerging Leaders PDX (the ELI program) explaining their three-phase DEIB Assessment (Diversity, Equity, Inclusion & Belonging) used to score Company Partners hosting interns.

TL;DR

  • Document type — institutional reference doc, not Yahir's prose. Sent to ELI intern candidates so they can interpret the DEIB phase shown next to each Company Partner.
  • Three phases —
    • Phase 3: Blossoming — committed to equity work, has a positive work environment.
    • Phase 2: Budding — discussion-and-planning stage; "acknowledge the need for this work, are in the education stage."
    • Phase 1: Seedling — "early in their DEIB journey"; encouraged to move toward attitudes/behaviors that produce policy change.
  • Framing — ELI explicitly notes DEIB is "not something we master but rather that we monitor and seek to continually improve upon." Phase 3 is not endgame.
  • Why surfaced — Yahir was the ELI intern candidate at this time (companion to the January 2023 ELI internship doc); the DEIB-phase visibility was given to him as a candidate to evaluate prospective placements.
  • Operational role — interns use the phase score to gauge whether a placement will create a "safe and supportive work experience for our Emerging Leaders of Color."

Pattern observed

This sits alongside 2023 01 30 eli internship (the existing summary) as the two-document ELI thread in the corpus — September 2022 he received the program's framework material; January 2023 he was actively engaged in the internship process. The doc is bureaucratic but reveals the selection-gate logic Yahir was navigating as an Emerging Leader of Color: not just "is this company hiring?" but "what DEIB phase have they reached?"

The document's link to a rebrand.ly/deiblist resource list is a typical ELI scaffolding move — programmatic equity infrastructure for college interns. Belongs in the same scholarship/program-admin cluster as the Ford, JCEF, and CIEE administrative threads.

Open questions

  • Did Yahir end up placed at a Phase-3, Phase-2, or Phase-1 company? (Not surfaced in this doc; the 2023 01 30 eli internship note may resolve.)
  • Has the ELI program graph yet to surface its Company Partners as named entities? (No; queued to Potential Entities for densify if any specific company name surfaces.)
